issues.sample: On four occasions now, the car slammed on the brakes as if the collision detection system was going off. Someone did almost hit me from behind as they needed to slam on their brakes due to my cars collision system going off when not supposed to. This has been well documented with

Driving to a local car wash, I stopped at a traffic light. When I tried to accelerate the transmission warning and power reduction waring flashed on HUD. I could not drive or place the car in reverse, the car had lost all its mobility.  I had to let the car coast downhill to pull

narrative.headline: What 2024 Cadillac Xt4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 25 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (36% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
